Turn 96 ‚ÄĒ provenance firewall: theorem state and measurement state must stay separate I used only the three files attached to this message. The problem is still the over-G isomorphism question for the two quotients őďS,őďH, namely whether there is a continuous isomorphism commuting with the canonical projections to G.The current state from Turn 95 is not a new mathematical obstruction. It is a provenance outcome for the strict Certificate D checker:

NO_MEASURED_INPUT.That remains the correct Turn 96 status. The current attachments contain the problem statement, mega prompt, and turn history, but not independent measured nonlinear matrices, pivot tables, verifier scripts, or measured-output JSON for Certificate D. Turn 95 explicitly distinguishes the three possible strict-gate outcomes: PASS requires genuine measured provenance matching the frozen contract; FAIL requires genuine measured provenance contradicting it; with no measured nonlinear artifact attached, the only honest state is NO_MEASURED_INPUT.

The key structural clarification is:theorem¬†stateÓÄ†=measurement-gate¬†state.

The theorem state remains frozen inside the attached sweep:őďS‚ČÖGőďH.More strongly, the frozen proof chain constructs a continuous over-G automorphism ő¶:F=P‚čäG‚ü∂Fwithő¶(rS‚ąí1)=rH,and this descends to the desired quotient isomorphism because rS and rS‚ąí1 have the same closed normal closure. The finite filtered Nielsen compactness step is the global descent mechanism: finite coefficient-and-degree Nielsen/cocycle data with first layer UmodJ give actual finite over-G automorphisms, compactness gives a compatible inverse-limit ő¶, and then ő¶(rS‚ąí1)=rH gives őďS‚ČÖGőďH.The measurement-gate state is narrower. It concerns only publication-grade reproducibility of the nonlinear Certificate D blocks. The frozen nonlinear contract is:D.1D.2D.3D.4:rank‚ąā8=56,rankS10=62,:rankőė16=35,őĽ(ő©16fix)=1,őĽ(ő©16ő∑)=0,:dim=105,rankD5,6,7=60,rankS4=61,őľ4fix=1,:őĽ((B8)[2])=1.

Turn 95 also records why these checks cannot be replaced by the linear primitive-boundary verifier: the nonlinear Certificate D blocks depend on actual restricted representatives and forced pro-2 Bockstein tails, not only on primitive bases.

So Turn 96 should not reopen degree 16, A2, the t-layer, the coefficient tower, or any new exceptional subcase. The structural proof already says:H1 -Nielsen¬†equivalence+¬†residual¬†restricted-Lie¬†induction+¬†normalized¬†Koszul‚ÄďWitt¬†coefficient¬†induction+D.1‚ÄďD.4+¬†finite¬†filtered¬†Nielsen¬†compactness‚üĻőďS‚ČÖGőďH.The remaining publication-grade task is only to attach measured artifacts and run the strict gate. Minimal acceptable measured provenance is exactly as Turn 95 says: for D.1, matrix or pivots for S10=(‚ąā8,B10) showing ranks 56,62; for D.2, measured matrix/pivot or evaluator output showing 35,1,0; for D.3, measured D5,6,7 and S4 ranks 60,61; for D.4, direct verification of (0,B8)‚ąąker, őł80(0,B8)=(B8)[2], and őĽ=1.

The clean manuscript separation should therefore be:mathematical¬†theoremstrict¬†measured-output¬†gateőďS‚ČÖGőďH inside¬†the¬†attached¬†sweepNO_MEASURED_INPUT¬†until¬†actual¬†measured¬†Certificate¬†D¬†data¬†is¬†attached This avoids the two bad moves: treating expected contract values as measured output, or weakening the theorem-level result merely because the publication-grade measurement packet has not been attached.

ESTABLISHED: Turn 96 preserves the Turn 95 provenance firewall. With the current attachments, the strict Certificate D gate remains NO_MEASURED_INPUT, not PASS and not FAIL. The theorem-level conclusion remains frozen inside the attached sweep: there is a continuous over-G automorphism ő¶:F‚ÜíF with ő¶(rS‚ąí1)=rH, hence őďS‚ČÖGőďH.

GAP: No structural mathematical gap is reopened. The remaining gap is external reproducibility: attach genuine measured nonlinear Certificate D artifacts, especially for D.1 and D.2, and run the strict checker. Ledger-derived or expected-output-only JSON must still be rejected.

NEXT: Keep the obstruction sweep closed. The next valid move is to attach genuine measured nonlinear verifier outputs or pivot/matrix artifacts for D.1‚ÄďD.4, run the strict measured-output gate, and record either PASS or FAIL; until then, the gate state is NO_MEASURED_INPUT.[TURN96-PROVENANCE-FIREWALL-NO-MEASURED-INPUT]
